## What changed
Describe clearly what was modified in this pull request.
Include new features, bug fixes, refactoring, or documentation updates.
Mention important files or components affected by this change.

## Why
Explain the reason behind these changes.
What problem does this solve? What improvement does it introduce?
Provide context so reviewers understand the motivation.

## How to test
Steps to verify the changes:

1. Pull this branch locally.
2. Activate the virtual environment.
3. Run the project using the provided command.
4. Confirm the expected behavior or output appears.

## Checklist
Before opening this PR, I confirm that:

- [ ] The code works as expected
- [ ] I tested the changes locally
- [ ] No debug prints or temporary code remain
- [ ] Documentation is updated if needed
- [ ] The PR focuses on a single logical change
